text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I'm walking through the central plaza...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hm, hm, hmm! ♪ What am I g'nna have for
dinner? ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Spe! Give me a deep bow!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oka—
Fwoosh!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Waah?! Uh, did something go right by me—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, stay on your toes! Now turn around!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: O-okay!
Fwooosh!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Eeek! S-something is zooming around me, I just
know it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
There's more where that came from. Next, take a
step to the right!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: O-okay!
Fwooosh!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And to wrap things up... pose like an idol and
give me your best catchphrase! Now!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: An idol?! Ohhh, ummm!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm your sup'r idol, Spe! Zing! ☆
Fwip, fwip! Thwomp!
GAAAAAHHHHH!
Thud!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wh-what was that?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Phew, you were in quite the sticky situation, Spe.
But everything's A-OK now! Case closed! ☆

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
W-wait, Sei! What was that just now?! I'm certain I
heard a weird noise, followed by someone
shrieking...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hold on... Golshi's passed out?! And she's covered
in goop?! What's happenin'?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, here's a quick rundown.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I was just on my little meander, nothing special.
And there Golshi was, with her sights set on you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Right... Wait, what?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And what does Golshi have? A bunch of mud
boomerangs! Escape your turmoil, Spe! To the
right, to the left!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So that's why you had me turning and moving around!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yup, and all of the boomerangs came flying right
back at Golshi. Womp, womp.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, because they're boomerangs... That makes
sense. So you made me pose for a reason too,
right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: No, I just wanted to see you pose. That's all!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: WHAAAAAT?! I c-can't believe I did that...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But you did really help me out there... So, thank
you!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What an honest little cupcake you are. I just
happened to be watching from the sidelines,
that's all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Welp, that should be the last of your questions.
Wanna head back?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sure. Um... is it okay to leave Golshi here
unconscious?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Golshi's a tough cookie! She's fiiine... Probably! ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: SPEEEE ANNDD... SKYYY? Hi, how ya doing? ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, she's awake.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Guess we've got no choice but to book it! Let's
go! ☆

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Waaargh?! H-hey! Wait for me, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
BWAHAHA! I'll give you both a mud makeover,
free of charge!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week panics and quickly follows Seiun
Sky's lead...
